style: Vibrant 3D cartoon, Subway Surfers energy, thick outlines, warm palette: cream #fdf3e3, gold #ffd166, amber #e9a23b, coral #ff5d73, deep brown #1a0f08. CHARACTER BIBLE — the kid: 10 years old, curly dark-brown hair, orange t-shirt, blue shorts, sandals, wicker basket. Sprites go on FLAT MAGENTA #ff00ff (the game chroma-keys it out); backdrops need no transparency. Generate with bin/imagepack shukshopper/assets

images.prompt: Painted game background, vibrant 3D cartoon style, for an endless-runner set in Shuk HaCarmel, Tel Aviv: dense market lane of stalls with red-and-white striped awnings, hanging t-shirts and tote bags, juice stands with orange pyramids, crowded color everywhere, distant Tel Aviv towers and bright Mediterranean sky, hot golden afternoon light. Composition: all detail in the upper two-thirds; the bottom third fades to plain flat warm tan ground #c9a26b with NO objects (the game's road is drawn over it). Warm palette: cream #fdf3e3, gold #ffd166, amber #e9a23b, coral #ff5d73. No people, no animals, no text.
